sections.paragraph:
ρυτήρ (ρῡτηφαιλινγ ον λεμβυφ []) (ρ, ῆρος, ὁ,)
Etym. *ρύω, ἐρύω

I. one who draws or stretches, ρ. βιοῦ, ὀϊστῶν drawer of the bow, of arrows, Od.

2. like ἱμάς, the strap by which a horse draws, a trace, Il.:—also a rein, Il.; ἀπὸ ρυτῆρος with loose rein, Lat. immissis habenis, at full galop:—used as a strap to flog with, Dem., Aeschin.

II. (ρύομαι) a saver, guard, defender, Od.
